subcodes.first_line: O Yahya! Bear thou witness that thou hast hearkened unto the Call, and quaffed the Wine of Immortality from the hands of bounty, and visited the Ka'bah [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یحیی اشهد انک سمعت الندآء و شربت رحیق البقاء من ایادی العطاء و زرت کعبه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @growth of the Cause, @prayer for teaching, @prayer for detachment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
